exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Hold a dumbbell at chest height; sit down and up, chest tall.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Lower to mid-chest, pause briefly, press up without locking elbows hard.

exercises.name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Flat back, drive elbow up and back. 3 sec eccentric.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Lower back pinned to floor; opposite arm + leg, slow.

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry
exercises.notes: Walk with heavy dumbbells, tall posture. Stop at time or grip failure.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at the hips, soft knees, bar close to legs.
